reforms.description: The Second Community Support Framework (CSF) aims to improve educational qualifications and strengthen links between education, science, and technology institutions and firms, with a target to increase R&D spending in GDP to between 1.2 and 1.5 percent by 1999.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Improving educational qualifications and linking education with R&D is expected to enhance innovation capacity and productivity.
reforms.status_evidence: The reform has been successfully implemented as part of the CSF.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform represents a significant structural change aimed at enhancing R&D investment through education.
reforms.source_quote: The science and technology sub-programme aims at strengthening the quality and quantity of the scientific system in Portugal, with the aim of increasing the share of R&D spending in GDP to between 1.2 and 1.5 per cent in 1999.

reforms.description: The 1991 Agreement on vocational training policy aims to improve the integration between education and the workplace, develop training for disadvantaged groups, and enhance the involvement of social partners in labor and training policies.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing vocational training and workplace integration is expected to improve the skills of the workforce, thereby supporting innovation and productivity.
reforms.status_evidence: The agreement has been successfully implemented and is in effect.
reforms.importance_rationale: This agreement represents a major reform in vocational training policy, aiming for systemic change.
reforms.source_quote: The agreement defines key measures and strategic objectives of vocational training policy.

reforms.description: The government has implemented educational and training reforms aimed at addressing deficiencies in the education system, including the extension of compulsory schooling to nine years and the diversification of educational streams at the secondary level.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Addressing educational deficiencies and extending compulsory schooling is expected to enhance the overall skill level of the population, supporting future innovation.
reforms.status_evidence: The reforms have been successfully implemented and are currently in effect.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant structural change in the education system.
reforms.source_quote: Recent measures include the extension of compulsory schooling to nine years; the diversification of educational streams at the secondary level.
